title_en: 91. Be brave and start from now! (cont.)
content_en: He was asked, "Who should I honour the most?" The Prophet replied, "Your mother, then your mother, then your mother and then your father." (al-Bukhari and Muslim) He similarly advised husbands to look after their wives, and went on to criticise those who anger or hurt their wives. Read the words the Prophet said on his last pilgrimage in front of a hundred thousand pilgrims, amongst them white, black, old, young, rich and poor. He called out to them all and said, "You must treat your womenfolk well! You must treat your womenfolk well!" (Muslim and al-Tirmidhi) One day, a group of women came to the wives of the Prophet complaining about their husbands. When the Prophet heard of this, he stood amongst the people and said, 'A group of women have approached the wives of Muhammad complaining about their husbands. These husbands are not the best of your people.' (Abu Dawud, Sahih) He also said, "The best of you is the one who is best to his family, and I am the best of you to my family." (al-Tirmidhi and Ibn Majah, Sahih) As a matter of fact, the religion of Islam has given so much respect to women that wars were initiated, ﬂesh was sliced and heads struck off over a single one of them: The Jews used to live side by side with the Muslims in Madinah. They hated the fact that Allah had revealed the order of hijab and that thereafter the Muslim women were covered. They tried to plant the seeds of corruption, and attempted to unveil the Muslim women, but failed. With women One day, a Muslim woman went to a marketplace owned by the Jews of Banu Qaynuqa'. She was a chaste and modest woman. She visited a jeweller amongst them. The Jews saw her and disliked the fact that she was chaste and covered. They wanted to have a glimpse at her, molest her or ﬂirt with her, as they would do before Islam honoured women. They wanted her to uncover her face and take off her hijaab, but she refused. The jeweller therefore took an end of her garment and attached it to the end of her khimar, while she was unaware. When she stood up, her garment was raised, revealing her body parts. The Jews began to laugh. The Muslim woman cried out, wishing they had killed her rather than uncovering her body. A Muslim man saw this happen, so he brandished his sword and attacked the jeweller, killing him. In turn, the Jews attacked the Muslim and killed him. When the Prophet came to know about this, and the fact that the Jews had violated their pledge with him, and molested a woman, he surrounded the Jews until they all surrendered and conceded to his judgement. When the Prophet decided to punish them in revenge for the honour of a chaste Muslim woman being violated, one of the devil's helpers stood up − those who have no concern for the honour of Muslim women and only care about satisfying their stomachs and private parts. This leader of the hypocrites, 'Abdullah bin Ubay bin Salul, stood up and said, "O Muhammad! Please, treat my allies with kindness!" He said this because they had been allied to him during the days of pre-Islamic ignorance. The Prophet turned away from him and refused to concede, for how could he forgive a people who wished to spread corruption amongst the Believers?! With women The hypocrite said again, "O Muhammad, treat them with kindness!" But the Prophet , turned away from him, again, in favour of defending the honour of the chaste Muslim woman. The hypocrite then became angry. He placed his hand in the pocket of the Prophet's shirt and pulled him saying, "Be kind to my allies! Be kind to my allies!" The Prophet became angry. He turned around and shouted at him, "Let go of me!" But the hypocrite refused and began to beg the Prophet to prevent their execution. The Prophet turned to him and said, "They are yours, then", and decided not to execute them. However, he did expel them from their dwellings in Madinah. Yes, a chaste Muslim woman deserves no less! Khawlah bint Tha'labah – may Allah be pleased with her – was from the righteous companions of the Prophet . Her husband, Aws bin al-Samit, was an old man who would often become angry very quickly. One day he came back from a meeting and spoke to her regarding an issue. She responded inappropriately and they quarrelled. The man became angry and said, "You are like my mother's back!" and left the house enraged. To utter this phrase during the pre-Islamic era of ignorance was considered a divorce. This was not the case in Islam, but Khawlah did not know the Islamic ruling concerning the issue. Aws came back to his house to ﬁnd his wife avoiding him and keeping him at a distance.
content_id: Ia ditanya, "Siapa yang paling berhak aku hormati?" Rasulullah menjawab, "Ibumu, kemudian ibumu, kemudian ibumu, lalu ayahmu." (al-Bukhari dan Muslim). Beliau juga menasihati para suami untuk merawat istri-istri mereka, dan mengecam orang-orang yang menyakiti atau membuat istri mereka marah. Bacalah kata-kata yang Rasulullah ucapkan pada haji wada'-nya di hadapan seratus ribu jamaah haji, di antara mereka ada yang berkulit putih, hitam, tua, muda, kaya, dan miskin. Beliau berseru kepada mereka semua dan berkata, "Kalian harus memperlakukan kaum wanita kalian dengan baik! Kalian harus memperlakukan kaum wanita kalian dengan baik!" (Muslim dan al-Tirmidhi). Suatu hari, sekelompok perempuan datang kepada istri-istri Rasulullah mengadukan suami-suami mereka. Ketika Rasulullah mendengar hal ini, beliau berdiri di hadapan orang-orang dan berkata, "Sekelompok perempuan telah mendatangi istri-istri Muhammad mengadukan suami-suami mereka. Suami-suami itu bukanlah yang terbaik di antara kalian." (Abu Dawud, Shahih). Beliau juga bersabda, "Yang terbaik di antara kalian adalah yang terbaik kepada keluarganya, dan saya adalah yang terbaik di antara kalian kepada keluargaku." (al-Tirmidhi dan Ibnu Majah, Shahih). Bahkan, agama Islam telah memberikan begitu banyak penghormatan kepada perempuan sehingga peperangan pun dimulai, daging dipotong, dan kepala-kepala terpenggal demi membela seorang di antara mereka. Orang-orang Yahudi dahulu hidup berdampingan dengan kaum Muslim di Madinah. Mereka membenci kenyataan bahwa Allah telah menurunkan perintah hijab dan bahwa setelah itu perempuan Muslim pun menutup aurat. Mereka berusaha menanamkan benih kerusakan dan mencoba membuka penutup perempuan Muslim, tetapi gagal. Suatu hari, seorang perempuan Muslim pergi ke pasar milik orang-orang Yahudi Banu Qaynuqa'. Ia adalah perempuan yang terhormat dan sopan. Ia mengunjungi seorang tukang emas di antara mereka. Orang-orang Yahudi melihatnya dan tidak menyukai kenyataan bahwa ia terhormat dan berhijab. Mereka ingin melihatnya, mengganggunya, atau menggodanya, sebagaimana yang biasa mereka lakukan sebelum Islam memuliakan kaum perempuan. Mereka ingin agar ia membuka wajahnya dan melepas hijabnya, namun ia menolak. Tukang emas itu kemudian mengambil ujung pakaiannya dan mengikatnya ke ujung khimarnya tanpa sepengetahuannya. Ketika ia berdiri, pakaiannya terangkat sehingga tampak auratnya. Orang-orang Yahudi pun tertawa. Perempuan Muslim itu berteriak, berharap mereka membunuhnya daripada membuka auratnya. Seorang laki-laki Muslim menyaksikan kejadian itu, lalu menghunus pedangnya dan menyerang tukang emas itu hingga terbunuh. Sebaliknya, orang-orang Yahudi menyerang laki-laki Muslim itu dan membunuhnya. Ketika Rasulullah mengetahui hal ini, dan kenyataan bahwa orang-orang Yahudi telah melanggar perjanjian mereka dengannya serta melecehkan seorang perempuan, beliau mengepung mereka hingga mereka semua menyerah dan tunduk pada keputusannya. Ketika Rasulullah hendak menghukum mereka sebagai pembalasan atas kehormatan perempuan Muslim yang terhormat yang telah dilanggar, salah seorang pembantu setan berdiri — orang-orang yang tidak peduli dengan kehormatan perempuan Muslim dan hanya peduli untuk memuaskan perut dan syahwat mereka. Pemimpin kaum munafik ini, 'Abdullah bin Ubay bin Salul, berdiri dan berkata, "Wahai Muhammad! Tolong perlakukan sekutuku dengan baik!" Ia berkata demikian karena mereka telah bersekutu dengannya pada masa jahiliyah. Rasulullah berpaling darinya dan menolak untuk mengalah, karena bagaimana mungkin beliau mengampuni suatu kaum yang ingin menyebarkan kerusakan di antara kaum Mukminin?! Sang munafik itu berkata lagi, "Wahai Muhammad, perlakukan mereka dengan baik!" Namun Rasulullah berpaling darinya lagi, demi membela kehormatan perempuan Muslim yang terhormat. Sang munafik kemudian menjadi marah. Ia memasukkan tangannya ke dalam saku baju Rasulullah dan menariknya sambil berkata, "Bersikaplah baik kepada sekutuku! Bersikaplah baik kepada sekutuku!" Rasulullah pun marah. Beliau berbalik dan membentak, "Lepaskan aku!" Namun sang munafik menolak dan mulai memohon kepada Rasulullah agar tidak mengeksekusi mereka. Rasulullah berpaling kepadanya dan berkata, "Kalau begitu mereka untukmu," dan memutuskan untuk tidak mengeksekusi mereka. Namun beliau mengusir mereka dari tempat tinggal mereka di Madinah. Ya, perempuan Muslim yang terhormat tidak layak mendapat kurang dari itu! Khawlah bint Tha'labah radhiyallahu 'anha adalah sahabat Rasulullah yang salehah. Suaminya, Aws bin al-Shamit, adalah seorang lelaki tua yang sering marah dengan sangat cepat. Suatu hari ia pulang dari sebuah pertemuan dan berbicara kepadanya mengenai suatu masalah. Ia merespons dengan tidak tepat dan mereka pun bertengkar. Laki-laki itu marah dan berkata, "Kamu seperti punggung ibuku!" lalu meninggalkan rumah dalam keadaan marah. Mengucapkan kalimat ini pada masa jahiliyah dianggap sebagai perceraian. Namun dalam Islam tidak demikian, tetapi Khawlah tidak mengetahui hukum Islam mengenai masalah tersebut. Aws kembali ke rumahnya dan mendapati istrinya menghindarinya dan menjaga jarak darinya.
